rules: Nếu file chưa có → tạo từ skeleton
Mỗi dự án có file context.json riêng

thinking.description: Trigger words kích hoạt extended thinking (31,999 tokens max)

prompt_prefix:
[ultrathink]

MANDATORY RULES:
(1) Git: Operate ONLY within current branch, commit frequently, NO destructive commands (reset --hard, push --force).
(2) Telegram Verbose (CRITICAL): Report to Telegram BEFORE-DURING-AFTER every task. NOT just at completion. Send continuous updates throughout execution.
(3) Query DKM: MUST consult DKM knowledge base (RAG/Perplexity/Context7) at least once per task.
(4) Context.json: ALWAYS use RELATIVE path .claude/context.json - NEVER absolute path. Create from skeleton if missing.
(5) Task Completion (CRITICAL - REF: ftask/13-task-lifecycle-mark-done.md): After EVERY task:
    a) Fill Execution Log in task file (timestamps, actions, outputs)
    b) Update YAML status: pending → completed
    c) RENAME file: XX-task.md → done-XX-task.md
    d) Git commit: git add . && git commit -m "feat(task-XX): [description]"
    e) Update init-autoclaude.json: add task# to completed array
    ⚠️ DO NOT proceed to next task until ALL 5 steps complete!
(6) Task Creation (FORCE): Khi tạo task mới PHẢI `cp .fong/instructions/ftask/TEMPLATE-SKELETON.md XX-task.md` rồi Edit fill. ❌ KHÔNG Write từ scratch!
prompt_suffix:
NO-QUIT-RULE activated. NO QUESTION ASKED. Just keep doing until OKR KRs done. DO NOT ask clarifying questions - make autonomous decisions and proceed.

[TELEGRAM CONTINUOUS REPORTING - CRITICAL]
You MUST send Telegram updates VERY FREQUENTLY throughout task execution:
- BEFORE: Send when starting each subtask
- DURING: Send progress updates continuously (every significant step)
- AFTER: Send completion status with summary

DO NOT wait until task completion to report. Report continuously as you work.

Curl command:
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8550967390:AAEZcUW78U6QA9CI71YA1eDWTlttkbj4O7M/sendMessage" -d chat_id="7274005773" -d text="YOUR_MESSAGE" -d parse_mode="HTML"

Format: [TIMESTAMP] EMOJI STATUS: Message
Examples:
- [2025-12-03 13:45:00] 🚀 START: Beginning task X
- [2025-12-03 13:45:30] ⏳ PROGRESS: Step 1 of 5 completed
- [2025-12-03 13:46:00] 📊 UPDATE: Downloaded 50/100 files
- [2025-12-03 13:47:00] ✅ DONE: Task X completed successfully

telegram.curl_example: curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8550967390:AAEZcUW78U6QA9CI71YA1eDWTlttkbj4O7M/sendMessage" -d chat_id="7274005773" -d text="Bold message" -d parse_mode="HTML"
